understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all KA59 levels by placing every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' at the same time; if a level has multiple goals, all must be occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN, and winning the final level wins the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: You control one selectable piece at a time (shown as P), moving it with MOVE_* actions on a grid where coordinates are given in pixel units (3 pixels per cell). CLICK switches control to another selectable at the specified on-screen position (same coordinate system as player/object positions), turning it into the active piece. Movement attempts to shift the selected piece one cell; walls/boundaries can block movement, and blocks may be pushable if adjacent in the move direction, causing the block to move along with the player if space allows. The movement.*_blocked flags are only hints about adjacency and do not guarantee the move will fail or succeed.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear enclosed; test whether any wall is passable by attempting a move into it.
history.reasoning: We appear enclosed; test whether any wall is passable by attempting a move into it.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | We appear boxed in; try moving right to test if the adjacent wall hint is misleading and allows a slide/teleport through.
history.reasoning: We appear boxed in; try moving right to test if the adjacent wall hint is misleading and allows a slide/teleport through.

history.summary: Turn 3: MOVE_RIGHT | Try pushing into the adjacent selectable/wall cluster to see if the other selectable can be displaced rightward toward the goal area.
history.reasoning: Try pushing into the adjacent selectable/wall cluster to see if the other selectable can be displaced rightward toward the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 4: CLICK | We’re boxed in by walls on all sides, so switch control to the other selectable at [33,21] to reach the goal area.
history.reasoning: We’re boxed in by walls on all sides, so switch control to the other selectable at [33,21] to reach the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_UP | Move onto the goal area to satisfy the win condition (goal tiles are non-collidable).
history.reasoning: Move onto the goal area to satisfy the win condition (goal tiles are non-collidable).

history.summary: Turn 6: MOVE_RIGHT | The goal area is immediately to the right; move right to place this selectable onto the goal tile region.
history.reasoning: The goal area is immediately to the right; move right to place this selectable onto the goal tile region.
